summary: Completed pre-deployment responsive design and cross-browser testing for golfinmallorca.com. All key pages render correctly on mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1920px) viewports. Navigation, readability, clickability verified. No layout breaking issues found.

issues: 5 broken images found on homepage (external URLs from third-party sources): mallorca-golf-travel.preview.emergentagent.com partner image, Cloudinary golf-son-parc-menorca, example.com test image, Belmond hotel image, Hilton hotel image
design_issues.note: These are external image URLs that may be temporarily unavailable or have access restrictions

homepage_desktop.details: Hero, navbar, golf courses, blog cards, footer all render correctly

homepage_tablet.details: Desktop nav visible, all sections render correctly

homepage_mobile.details: Hamburger menu visible, all sections render correctly

mobile_hamburger_menu.details: Opens/closes correctly, all nav links work (Golf Courses, Hotels, Restaurants, Cafés & Bars, Beach Clubs, Trip Planner, Reviews, Blog, Contact)

blog_post_page_responsive.details: Breadcrumbs, title, image, content, related posts all render correctly on mobile/tablet/desktop

terms_page_mobile.details: Readable on mobile, no horizontal overflow

privacy_page_mobile.details: Readable on mobile, no horizontal overflow

payment_page_mobile.details: Layout doesn't break on mobile, error state renders correctly

cookie_consent_banner.details: Visible at bottom-left on mobile, Accept and Preferences buttons clickable, Learn More links to /privacy

footer_logos.details: Illes Balears Sostenibles and Save the Med logos display correctly side by side, both clickable with target=_blank

footer_links.details: Privacy Policy and Terms of Service links navigate to correct pages

trip_planner_modal.details: Opens correctly on mobile, shows step wizard with service options

contact_form_mobile.details: All fields accessible (name, email, message), submit button visible on mobile

blog_read_more_links.details: 10 blog cards with Read More links navigate to /blog/[slug] pages (NOT modals)

navbar_sticky.details: Fixed position, visible at top of page, hides after scrolling past hero (by design - uses SectionNavigator)

text_readability.details: Hero: white text on dark background, Blog: dark text on cream background, Footer: light text on charcoal background

passed_tests: Homepage renders correctly on mobile (375px)
Homepage renders correctly on tablet (768px)
Homepage renders correctly on desktop (1920px)
Hero section visible with CTA buttons on all viewports
Mobile hamburger menu opens and closes
All mobile nav links work (Golf Courses, Hotels, Restaurants, etc.)
Desktop nav links hidden on mobile
Blog post page (/blog/best-time-golf-mallorca) responsive on all viewports
Blog breadcrumbs visible on all viewports
Blog title readable on mobile
Blog image loads correctly
Blog content renders without overflow
Blog related posts section visible
Terms page (/terms) readable on mobile
Privacy page (/privacy) readable on mobile
Payment page layout doesn't break on mobile
Cookie consent banner visible at bottom-left on mobile
Cookie Accept button clickable on mobile
Cookie Preferences button clickable on mobile
Cookie Learn More link points to /privacy
Footer Illes Balears logo displays and is clickable
Footer Save the Med logo displays and is clickable
Footer Privacy Policy link navigates to /privacy
Footer Terms of Service link navigates to /terms
Trip Planner modal opens correctly on mobile
Contact form fields accessible on mobile
Contact form submit button visible on mobile
Blog Read More links navigate to /blog/[slug] pages
Navbar is fixed position
Logo image loads correctly
Hero background image loads correctly
Scroll indicator visible on homepage
Language selector visible on desktop
Weather badge present
action_items: OPTIONAL: Review 5 broken external partner/hotel images on homepage (low priority - external URLs)
critical_code_review_comments: Responsive design is well implemented with proper breakpoints (md: 768px for tablet)
Mobile hamburger menu correctly shows/hides based on viewport
Cookie consent banner uses proper z-index (9999) and fixed positioning
Footer partner logos use mix-blend-screen for proper display on dark background
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Blog Read More links correctly use React Router <Link> for SEO-friendly navigation
Text contrast is good across all pages (white on dark hero, dark on cream content, light on charcoal footer)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Responsive design testing complete for iteration 24. All key pages tested on 3 viewports: mobile (375x812), tablet (768x1024), desktop (1920x1080). Key findings: (1) All pages render correctly without layout breaks, (2) Mobile hamburger menu works correctly, (3) Cookie consent banner is properly positioned at bottom-left and clickable, (4) Footer logos (Illes Balears + Save the Med) display correctly, (5) Blog Read More links navigate to /blog/[slug] pages, (6) Trip Planner modal opens on mobile, (7) Contact form is usable on mobile. Minor issue: 5 broken external images from third-party sources (hotels, partners) - these are external URLs that may have access restrictions. Key data-testids used: navbar, mobile-menu-btn, mobile-menu, hero-section, hero-plan-trip, hero-book-tee-time, blog-section, blog-card-*, blog-read-*, footer, cookie-consent-banner, cookie-accept, cookie-decline, cookie-learn-more, terms-page, privacy-page, blog-post-page, blog-breadcrumbs, blog-post-title, blog-post-image, blog-post-content, blog-related-posts.
